_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to identify legal, policy, and technical limitations when conducting cyberspace operations.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing activities, AI system deployments, or business model changes, providing compliance risk assessment before implementation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-004 (AG, cosine: 0.519), RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.518).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.348). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [conducting, cyberspace, identify, legal, limitations, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, assessment, business, changes, compliance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.893, R=0.882). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to identify legal, policy, and technical limitations when conducting cyb" and "Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing acti" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.528 > STS 0.348 (gap +0.180). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [conducting, cyberspace, identify, legal, limitations, operations]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, assessment, business, changes, compliance].
